steps.title: Find where height rises
steps.content: The graph shows a projectile path. Its height increases until the vertex, then decreases after the vertex.

steps.title: Use the vertex
steps.content: From the graph, the vertex occurs at $x=2$. The height is increasing from $x=0$ up to $x=2$ and is not increasing for intervals that continue past $x=2$.

steps.title: Select the full increasing interval
steps.content: The only listed interval entirely on the rising part of the graph is from $x=0$ to $x=2$. The answer is A.
